Los Mazatlecos.description: Mexican criminal organization formerly the enforcer gang of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel, operating independently since 2017 under Fausto Isidro Meza Flores. Based in Guasave, Sinaloa, it engages in drug trafficking, murder, kidnapping, and extortion. The group is in a turf war with the Sinaloa Cartel and active in Sinaloa, Sonora, Durango, and Nayarit.

descriptions: Los Mazatlecos is a loyalist wing of the Beltrán-Leyva Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Mazatlecos in Sinaloa and Nayarit, an armed loyalist wing of the Beltrán Leyva brothers, currently fighting the Sinaloa Cartel in northern Sinaloa.

descriptions: Guasave Cartel is a faction of the Beltrán Leyva Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Early May 2025, the Guasave Cartel, a faction of the Beltrán Leyva Organization led by Fausto Isidro Meza Flores (“Chapo Isidro”), abandoned its previous neutral stance.

descriptions: Los Mazatlecos is a splinter group loyal to Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Mazatlecos ó Cártel de Guasave y Cártel de La Mochomera en Sinaloa y Nayarit, leales a los Beltrán Leyva.

descriptions: Hells Angels members planned to kill Kingsmen members due to territorial conflict.

Kozakura-ikka.description: The Kozakura-ikka is a yakuza organization based in Kagoshima, Kyushu, Japan, with an estimated 40 active members. It was formed in 1948 by Seizo Osato. The group is noted for its unique policy, the 'Kozakura Monroe Doctrine', of not operating outside Kagoshima Prefecture and not allowing other yakuza syndicates to enter. Its criminal activities include protection racketeering, drug trafficking, and unlawful involvement in public works.

descriptions: Hiraoka-gumi is a sub-group of Kozakura-ikka, as its leader became the fourth president of Kozakura-ikka.
edges.evidence_quote: 4th (1988-): Kiei Hiraoka (平岡 喜榮) who was 1st kumicho of the Hiraoka-gumi.

descriptions: Bra Boys members are associated with the North Maroubra Surf Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is often linked with the North Maroubra Surf Riders (NMSR), with which a number of its members are associated.

descriptions: The Hackney Bombers clashed with the Tottenham Turks gang.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 May 2024, the Hackney Bombers, a Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, came to prominence following clashes with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang.

Woolwich Boys.description: Organised street gang based in Woolwich, south-east London, founded in the late 1990s. Initially a youth gang involved in street crime, it evolved into a structured criminal organization engaged in drug trafficking and contract killing. Younger offshoots focus on violent street crime while older members run cocaine trafficking rings. The gang has an estimated 300 members, predominantly Somali, and remains active.

descriptions: Woolwich Boys is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower), Peckham Boys , Woolwich Boys , Cherry Boys

Winter Hill Gang.description: The Winter Hill Gang was a loose confederation of American organized crime figures based in the Boston area, primarily active from 1961 to 2000. Founded by James 'Buddy' McLean and Howard 'Howie' Winter, it was predominantly Irish-American and involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, gambling, and weapons smuggling. The gang was the second most powerful criminal organization in New England after the Patriarca crime family. It was taken over by James 'Whitey' Bulger in 1979 and eventually dissolved.

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang competed with Angiulo brothers for control of rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: until Irish Mob groups such as the Winter Hill Gang and the Charlestown Mob decided to run the rackets in their own neighborhoods

descriptions: The two gangs were engaged in a violent gang war from 1961 onward.
edges.evidence_quote: The Charlestown Gang became involved in a gang war with a rival Irish mob group, the Winter Hill Gang of Somerville led by James 'Buddy' McLean, beginning in 1961.

descriptions: The Killeen Gang and Mullen Gang were consolidated under the control of the Winter Hill Gang in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: After a sit-down at Chandler's restaurant in the South End, Boston, the two gangs joined forces with Winter as overall boss.

descriptions: The Mullen Gang was allied with the Winter Hill Gang, as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Winter Hill Gang

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang listed as rival in infobox.

descriptions: The Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang are portrayed as enemies in a bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: The Patriarca crime family is considered an important part of the plot of the 2015 biopic crime film Black Mass, as they are considered the main enemies of the Winter Hill Gang, led by the bloodthirsty James 'Whitey' Bulger.

descriptions: Paul Weadick was an associate of both organizations, indicating a cooperative link.
